400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The server cannot process the request due to a client error.
400.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.description: The request has not been applied because it lacks valid authentication credentials for the target resource.
401.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

402.title: Payment Required
402.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

403.title: Forbidden
403.description: The server refused to authorize the request.
403.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

404.title: Not Found
404.description: The requested file or page cannot be found at this address.
404.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

405.title: Method Not Allowed
405.description: The method received in the request-line is not supported by the target resource.
405.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

406.title: Not Acceptable
406.description: The target resource does not have a current representation that would be acceptable to the user agent.
406.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

407.title: Proxy Authentication Required
407.description: The client needs to authenticate itself in order to use a proxy.
407.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.description: The server did not receive a complete request message within the time that it was prepared to wait.
408.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

409.title: Conflict
409.description: The request could not be completed due to a conflict with the current state of the target resource..
409.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

410.title: Gone
410.description: The access to the target resource is no longer available at the origin server.
410.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

411.title: Length Required
411.description: The server refuses to accept the request without a defined Content-Length.
411.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

412.title: Precondition Failed
412.description: One or more conditions given in the request header fields evaluated to false when tested on the server.
412.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

413.title: Payload Too Large
413.description: The server is refusing to process a request because the request payload is larger than the server is willing to process.
413.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

414.title: URI Too Long
414.description: The server is refusing to service the request because the request-target is longer than the server is willing to interpret.
414.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

415.title: Unsupported Media Type
415.description: The origin server is refusing to service the request because the payload is in a format not supported by this method on the target resource.
415.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

416.title: Range Not Satisfiable
416.description: The set of ranges requested has been rejected due to invalid ranges.
416.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

417.title: Expectation Failed
417.description: The expectation given in the request's expect header field could not be met by the inbound server.
417.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

418.title: I'm a teapot
418.description: I cannot brew your coffee because I'm a teapot.
418.conclusion: I cannot brew your coffee because I'm a teapot.

421.title: Misdirected Request
421.description: The server is not configured to produce responses for the combination of scheme and authority that are included in the request URI.
421.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

422.title: Unprocessable Entity
422.description: The server was unable to process the contained instructions.
422.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

423.title: Locked
423.description: The source or destination resource of a method is locked.
423.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

424.title: Failed Dependency
424.description: The method could not be performed on the resource because the requested action depended on another action failed.
424.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

425.title: Too Early
425.description: The server is unwilling to risk processing a request that might be replayed.
425.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

426.title: Upgrade Required
426.description: The server refuses to perform the request using the current protocol.
426.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

428.title: Precondition Required
428.description: The origin server requires the request to be conditional.
428.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.
429.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

431.title: Request Header Fields Too Large
431.description: The server is unwilling to process the request because its header fields are too large.
431.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

451.title: Unavailable For Legal Reasons
451.description: The server is denying access to the resource as a consequence of a legal demand.
451.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

500.title: Internal server error
500.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request.
500.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

501.title: Not Implemented
501.description: The server does not support the functionality required to fulfill the request.
501.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

502.title: Bad Gateway
502.description: The server, while acting as a gateway or proxy, received an invalid response from an inbound server.
502.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: The server is currently down for maintenance.
503.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

504.title: Gateway Timeout
504.description: The server, while acting as a gateway or proxy, did not receive a timely response from an upstream server.
504.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

505.title: HTTP Version Not Supported
505.description: The server does not support the major version of HTTP that was used in the request message.
505.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

506.title: Variant Also Negotiates
506.description: The server has an internal configuration error.
506.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

507.title: Insufficient Storage
507.description: The server is unable to store the representation needed to successfully complete the request.
507.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

508.title: Loop Detected
508.description: The server terminated an operation because it encountered an infinite loop while processing a request.
508.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

510.title: Not Extended
510.description: The policy for accessing the resource has not been met in the request.
510.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.

511.title: Network Authentication Required
511.description: The client needs to authenticate to gain network access.
511.conclusion: We are sorry for the inconvenience.
